semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: Lack of validation for blank index patterns in the index pattern parsing logic.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: Introduced a new validation method that checks for blank index patterns and throws a ParsingException with a specific error message.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Enhance index pattern validation to prevent blank index patterns from causing parsing errors.

hunk_chain.summary: Added a constant error message for blank index patterns and modified imports to include necessary utilities.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Sets up the error message needed for the new validation logic introduced in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Refactored the index pattern validation logic to use a new validate method that checks for blank patterns and throws exceptions appropriately.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Establishes the core validation logic that will be further refined in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Introduced a new method to resolve and validate index names, ensuring that blank names are caught and handled correctly.
